svg.title: Riff workflow animated comic strip
svg.desc: Five animated comic panels show a person pressing a hotkey, speaking, capturing screenshots, finishing the recording, and inserting the transcript with two images into Claude Code.
svg.text: Tap. Talk. Capture. Send the whole thought to Claude Code.

g.text: I need to use screenshots to explain something to Claude.
He keeps working while he talks.
Use the hotkey without breaking your flow.
PRESS A HOTKEY WHEN YOU'RE DONE.
Riff stops listening and sends the session.
CLAUDE GETS THE TRANSCRIPT AND SCREENSHOTS.
Update this dashboard using my notes.
Simplify the chart and make the headline clearer.

svg.text: Every panel moves continuously. Read left-to-right, top-to-bottom—or take in the whole workflow at once.
